title: Timeseries
description: Canonical cycler measurements (Arbin / Maccor / Bitrode / Digatron exports). One row per measurement sample per test. Stored as rows in harmonized/timeseries.parquet.

current_A.description: Positive = charge (current into the cell), negative = discharge.

coulomb_count_Ah.description: Cycler's running signed coulomb count (∫I dt) in Ah. Positive = charge into cell, negative = discharge. Per-cycle capacity scalars live in cycle_summary, not here.

displacement_um.description: Cell-surface displacement / swelling, micrometers. Null for sources without mechanical expansion measurement; populated for e.g. Mohtat 2021 (Keyence laser displacement, synchronous with V/I/T).
